---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for NERVIQ
title: "[enhancement] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Platform(s)

Which platforms would benefit? (claude / codex / cursor / copilot / gemini / windsurf / aider / opencode / all)

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
